!!! info "Two namespaces, two origins"

    **`Vhi.*`** is VHI's hand-written C# - what runs in the Godot scene.

    **`Myogestic.Vhi.V1.*`** is auto-generated by `Grpc.Tools` at build time
    from [`proto/myogestic_vhi.proto`](../grpc-api.md#the-full-contract): the
    typed request / reply messages, the `ControlMode` enum, and the
    `VhiControl.VhiControlBase` server stub that
    [`Vhi.VhiControlService`](Vhi.VhiControlService.md) implements. The
    namespace name follows protobuf convention - the same `.proto` is also
    vendored on the MyoGestic side. Edit the `.proto` (not these files) to
    change the wire contract.
